title: gesneria cuneifolia subsp. obovata
intro: Gesneria cuneifolia subsp. obovata, also known as a flowering plant species, is a type of Gesneria that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gesneria cuneifolia subsp. obovata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
